title: Fysiko Aerio Campaign Experiences
summary: Campaign landing pages and interactive work for a national energy brand, including Park Your Cinema, a basketball shoot-and-win game, and Village Cinemas collaborations.
problem: Energy is a low-engagement category. The campaigns used games, cinema tie-ins, and seasonal landing pages while retaining the brand and a clear conversion route.

cover.alt: Wireframe of a campaign landing page with game entry and dual call-to-action

sections.heading: Context
sections.body: A series of campaign projects for Fysiko Aerio, the Hellenic Energy Company, including Park Your Cinema landing pages, a basketball shoot-and-win game, and Village Cinemas collaborations.

sections.heading: Challenge
sections.body: Each activation needed its own character while remaining recognisably part of the same brand. Every experience also had to work on a phone as well as a desktop.

sections.heading: Process
sections.body: I designed the landing structures, game entry flows, and visual systems per campaign, keeping components reusable across activations and seasons.

sections.heading: Output
sections.body: A family of campaign landings and interactive experiences for a national energy brand.
